summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Categorized Goods/Skills/Services feature. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified CategorySelector components for Skills, Goods (offering/wanted), and Services (offering/wanted). Search, category expansion, item selection, custom item addition, and persistence all working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/categories/all - Returns all categories (5 goods, 5 skills, 7 services)
GET /api/categories/goods - Returns 5 goods categories (food, tools, crafts, livestock, miscellaneous)
GET /api/categories/skills - Returns 5 skills categories (homestead, landscape, trade, creative, life)
GET /api/categories/services - Returns 7 services categories (labor, equipment, animal, professional, education, health, custom)
Goods categories have correct structure (name, icon, items array)
Skills categories have correct structure (name, icon, items array)
Services categories have correct structure (name, icon, items array)
Profile update with skills from categories works
Profile update with goods_offering works
Profile update with goods_wanted works
Profile update with services_offering works
Profile update with services_wanted works
Profile update with custom items (not from predefined list) works
Categories persist after page reload
Frontend: Profile panel loads with data-testid='profile-panel'
Frontend: Skills CategorySelector displays with 5 category accordions
Frontend: Goods Offering CategorySelector displays with search and custom input
Frontend: Goods Wanted CategorySelector displays with search and custom input
Frontend: Services Offering CategorySelector displays with 7 category accordions
Frontend: Services Wanted CategorySelector displays with 7 category accordions
Frontend: Category accordions expand to show items
Frontend: Search functionality filters items across categories
Frontend: Selected items show checkmarks in category list
Frontend: Selected items display as removable badges
Frontend: Custom item input field works
Frontend: Save Profile button saves categories
Frontend: Success message 'Profile saved successfully' displays
Frontend: Categories persist after page reload
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing admin account for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Categorized goods/skills/services feature fully implemented and tested. Backend has 4 category endpoints: GET /api/categories/all, /api/categories/goods, /api/categories/skills, /api/categories/services. Frontend ProfilePanel uses CategorySelector component for each category type. CategorySelector supports: searchable dropdown, expandable category accordions, multi-select from predefined items, custom item addition, and displays selected items as removable badges. All data persists correctly to MongoDB via PUT /api/profile endpoint.

Backend API.GET /api/categories/goods: Returns Food, Tools, Crafts, Livestock, Miscellaneous with items
Backend API.GET /api/categories/skills: Returns Homestead, Landscape, Trade, Creative, Life skills with items
Backend API.GET /api/categories/services: Returns Labor, Equipment, Animal, Professional, Education, Health, Custom with items
Backend API.PUT /api/profile: Saves skills, goods_offering, goods_wanted, services_offering, services_wanted arrays

Frontend Components.CategorySelector for Skills: Working - shows 5 skill categories with search and custom input
Frontend Components.CategorySelector for Goods Offering: Working - shows 5 goods categories with green accent
Frontend Components.CategorySelector for Goods Wanted: Working - shows 5 goods categories with orange accent
Frontend Components.CategorySelector for Services Offering: Working - shows 7 service categories with green accent
Frontend Components.CategorySelector for Services Wanted: Working - shows 7 service categories with orange accent
Frontend Components.Search Functionality: Working - filters items across all categories
Frontend Components.Selected Badges: Working - removable badges display at bottom
Frontend Components.Custom Items: Working - can add items not in predefined list
Frontend Components.Save Profile: Working - saves all categories to backend
Frontend Components.Persistence: Working - categories persist after page reload
